parsed_review.summary: CP00-324 is a clean descriptor-only extension of the established CP00-321..323 intake-core pattern, covering RP10.P02.M09.S03-RP10.P02.M09.S12 (10 units, risk A) as one Claude Review Packet section of 10 rows. Pack baseline, deliverable distribution {implementation:6, security_audit:2, ui:2}, and micro-title distribution {Claude Review Packet:10} match consistently across the manifest, review baseline, registry pack binding, the intake-core contract projection, and the live closeout-pack plan head entry. The implementation (packages/intake/src/{registry,service,validators}.js) is composed solely of pure Object.freeze descriptor/validation builders: a targeted grep for child_process/spawn/fetch/http/writeFile/DB-write/process.env returned no matches, and the only filesystem usage in test/model.test.js and scripts/validate-rp10-intake-core-contract.mjs is read-only JSON loading plus assertions. Every no-write / no-runtime / no-leak boundary asserted in the manifest implementation_summary is corroborated by source and by the validator's deny-over-allow checks (cross_tenant_access_allowed:false, acquires_runtime_lock:false, persists_idempotency_key:false, creates_database_rows:false, writes_state_transition:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false). The authority boundary holds end to end: claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, read-only tools (Read/Grep/Glob) only, with runtime opening deferred to CP00-325 and human final approval; Hermes appears only as deterministic descriptor-string review-packet/receipt handling, never as product runtime. CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: the readiness auth-preflight passed with non-empty valid JSON (exit 0, 1448 bytes), the forbidden_review_evidence list is enforced in the contract/requirements, and the review request pins claude-opus-4-8 / max / read_only. production_ready is correctly false (status implemented_pending_review) with no enterprise-trust overclaim; the production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verification label only. The downstream evidence artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, which is expected at this read_only_claude_run stage of the hardening sequence and is not a defect. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; one non-blocking P3 bookkeeping inconsistency in the generated changed-file-scope.json. Pack and goal closeout are not blocked; final enterprise-trust approval remains with a human, and Claude is acting only as an independent read-only reviewer.

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json double-classifies the pack's own evidence dir and handoff doc as both implementation and unrelated-preserved
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-324/ (the pack's own evidence directory) and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md are listed simultaneously under untracked_implementation_files (lines 102-105) and under unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 107-113) in this generated scoping aid. These classifications are conceptually mutually exclusive: the cp00-324 directory is the pack's required evidence (manifest.json, command-evidence.json), not an unrelated dirty file. The authoritative manifest.json worktree_transition_policy.unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 530-534) correctly lists only the .docx, docs/ldip-integration/.../c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json, and workbook/. Because active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted and active_pack_required_untracked_files are both empty, nothing is actually dropped from or wrongly added to the committed scope, so there is no functional impact on closeout.
findings.recommendation: Adjust the changed-file-scope generator so the pack's own evidence directory (docs/closeout-packs/cp00-324/) and planning aux files (docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md) appear in exactly one classification, and align unrelated_dirty_files_preserved with the authoritative manifest worktree_transition_policy list (.docx, ldip invalid-attempt JSON, workbook/ only).
findings.post_review_disposition: Open, non-blocking (P3). Cosmetic/bookkeeping inconsistency in a generated scoping aid only; the authoritative manifest is correct and no active untracked implementation files are omitted. Does not block CP00-324 pack closeout or goal closeout; recommend fixing in the scope-generator at convenience.
